theme: The 2026 Q3 corporate window is closing — what's left

linkedin.text:
Quick mid-May reality check on Q3 2026 incentive trip availability.

The usable Q3 window for senior B2B groups is 8 weeks: late June through late August. After that, you hit:

→ September Jewish holidays (Israeli teams unavailable)
→ Q4 budget freezes already locking up
→ Hotel rates rising 15-25% as conference season starts
→ Air capacity tightening on European routes

What we still have inventory for (as of this week):

🇪🇸 Spain — 2 remaining flagship slots (Mallorca + Seville)
🇮🇹 Italy — Tuscany has 1 mid-July week, Sicily has full availability through August
🇬🇷 Greece — Crete and Rhodes both open; Santorini at premium rates only
🇵🇹 Portugal — Lisbon + Comporta region fully available
🇭🇷 Croatia — Hvar booked out, but Split + Dubrovnik mainland still open
🇨🇾 Cyprus — full availability, undervalued option for groups 40-80

What's already gone or tight:
❌ Mid-July weeks (school holiday spike)
❌ Marbella full luxury inventory
❌ Santorini at workable rates
❌ Anything August in Croatia

If you've been talking about "we should do a corporate trip" for 6 months — this is your 3-week window to decide. After early June, Q3 effectively becomes Q4 planning.

For groups of 40-180, with 1 budget conversation and a destination shortlist of 2-3, we can have a proposal back to you in 5 business days.

No pitch deck meeting needed.

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #UproductionEvents #MICE #Q3Planning #B2B #CorporateTravel #EventPlanning #SummerEvents #BookNow
